speaker: User
text: Hey, did you end up sending that report to the client?

speaker: Target
text: Yeah, I mean... I was going to, but then the whole thing with the server came up and I had to sort that out first, you know?

speaker: User
text: Okay. So it hasn't been sent yet?

speaker: Target
text: Well, not exactly, but I basically had it ready. It's mostly done. I just need to double-check a couple of numbers.

speaker: Target
text: Just... the revenue section. I want to make sure it matches what finance sent over. I think it does. It should be fine. I'm pretty sure it's right.

speaker: Target
text: I mean, yeah, probably. I'll try to get it out by end of day. Unless something else comes up. But yeah, that's the plan.

speaker: User
text: Is there a reason it's been delayed?

speaker: Target
text: No no, it's not really delayed. I've just been swamped. Everyone's been swamped. It's not like I'm the only one behind on stuff. I just want to make sure it's solid before I send it, that's all.

speaker: User
text: Alright, just let me know when it's out.

speaker: Target
text: For sure. Absolutely. You'll be the first to know. I'll ping you as soon as it's done. Definitely today.
